title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial on building agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code integration. The example project is an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator that demonstrates features like Plan Mode, context window management, and local execution with Anthropic API keys.
